description:
The image displays three panels illustrating Small Woody Features (SWF) in an agricultural setting, likely used for the validation of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) High Resolution Layer (HRL) SWF product.

The **left panel** is a ground-level photograph showing a dense green hedge in the foreground, with an orchard (trees laden with red fruit) visible behind it under a clear blue sky. Two white chevron arrows point inwards towards the hedge from the lower-left and lower-right, and "Google" is partially visible at the bottom.

The **middle panel** is an aerial orthophoto, presenting a high-resolution top-down view of a rural area. It features a straight, grey road running vertically on the left, several buildings (including one with a blue swimming pool), and large rectangular agricultural fields. Some fields are light brown, while others are dark green with visible crop rows. Linear features, representing hedges and tree lines (SWF), delineate the fields and properties.

The **right panel** is a cropped and pixelated section of the middle panel's agricultural area. This lower-resolution view shows distinct rectangular dark green fields bordered by lighter brown fields, with prominent linear dark green features representing SWF. The pixelated appearance illustrates a raster product, likely the 5x5 m pixel size raster layer used as a reference to validate the HRL SWF product, as described in the surrounding text.
